turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: No. 88-1369, Maryland against Buie will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, we vacate and remand for further proceedings the judgment of the Court of Appeals for Maryland. Justices Stevens and Kennedy have filed concurring opinions; Justice Brennan has filed a dissent in which Justice Marshall joins.
